description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage and a well-maintained front yard. The house features a combination of gable and flat roof sections, with the main entrance sheltered by a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading to the garage, as well as a backyard with green lawn and mature trees. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A separate structure, likely a garage or storage building, sits adjacent to the main house.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, covered porch, and fenced yard, featuring a mix of gable and flat roofs and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, driveway with two parked cars, and the detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden fence, backyard with a lawn and trees, and the rear of the house with additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, more trees, and the back facade of the house with a mix of window sizes and a patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the detached garage, driveway, and the side of the house with fewer windows and a clear view of the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single front door, steps leading up, and decorative trim
